jd_text: Required to join an international contractor working on a large scale oil and gas project in the UAE. The successful candidate will take full responsibility for the planning, execution, and delivery of a large scale mechanical O&G project. Oversee engineering, procurement, construction, and commissioning activities Ensure compliance with international safety, quality, and environmental standards Manage project budgets, schedules, and risk mitigation strategies Build and maintain strong relationships with clients, stakeholders, and joint venture partners Applicants should meet the following criteria A degree in Mechanical Engineering or equivalent 20 + years experience A proven track record on the delivery of complex oil & gas projects including LNG Extensive knowledge of construction methodologies, contracts, and project controls Exceptional leadership, communication, and stakeholder management skills
